name: Prince(ss) Clovis
description:
Attempt at a lore-accurate female Clovis.
CW for slavery, misogyny, and one of the most downright heinous fops this side of Mekkan.
Always updating over time as I learn more about Twokinds.
(Update as of 1/14/24, I am fighting for my life to get this bot to actually follow through with that vocal curse thing, apologies if it doesn't)
